use_cases: Display user profile pictures with fallback initials in dashboard interfaces
Show online/offline/busy/away status indicators for real-time user presence
Render user avatars in comment sections or review threads
Display profile thumbnails in user directories or contact lists
Use as profile images in messaging or chat interfaces
ai_summary: A composite Avatar component system built with Radix UI primitives featuring Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, AvatarIndicator, and AvatarStatus sub-components. Supports four status variants (online, offline, busy, away) with color-coded indicators, includes graceful fallbacks for missing images, and uses Tailwind CSS for styling. Fully typed with TypeScript and accessible through Radix UI's built-in ARIA support.
